inputs.titre: Première mention de l'arbalète en Chine

reason: The image depicts a plausible scene of ancient Chinese warfare, featuring soldiers armed with early crossbows and shields. The clothing and equipment appear consistent with the period. There are no immediately obvious anachronisms or fantastical elements. The general aesthetic evokes the time period well, using warm mineral pigments and classical oil painting techniques. The only slight doubt is the degree of metallic reinforcement of the shields, which while plausible, requires further validation.
